productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Black Jacket
description: Composition Black jacket made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, mock collar with a buttoned closure and a knitted inner collar, zippered front closure, embroidered branding on the left chest and two front pockets with buttoned closures Fitting Regular Wash care Dry clean only This jacket from US Polo is inspired by classic sport style staples. The sleek finish offers extra insulation in the cold. Layer it over t-shirts, denims and suede shoes to beat the winter chill. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
